subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Joy hath come, yet the people turn away therefrom, save whom God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, hath willed. O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الفرح الاعظم و الناس هم عنه معرضون الا من شاء الله المهیمن القیوم یا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @martyrdom of the Bab, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
